case_title: COOPER, WASHINGTON VS BROWN, EUGENE CURTIS JR et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER, WASHINGTON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORKERY, GLENDA FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS DOES NOT INCLUDE BROWN. THERE IS NO SERVICE OF PROCESS ON BROWN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
